title: Function AVG fails during runtime in a procedure
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE crmkartastitek (cislo_karty INTEGER NOT NULL, stitek_id INTEGER NOT NULL, stitek_nazev VARCHAR(255), stitek_upresneni VARCHAR(255), stitek_hodnota_decimal DECIMAL CHECK (stitek_hodnota_decimal >= 0));
CREATE TABLE crmkartapohyby (cislo_karty INTEGER NOT NULL, id_expedice INTEGER, pcena_sd DECIMAL NOT NULL CHECK (pcena_sd >= 0), pohyb VARCHAR(2) CHECK (pohyb IN ('VR', 'VV')));
INSERT INTO crmkartapohyby (cislo_karty, id_expedice, pcena_sd, pohyb) VALUES (1, 1001, 150.75, 'VR');
INSERT INTO crmkartapohyby (cislo_karty, id_expedice, pcena_sd, pohyb) VALUES (1, 1002, NULL, 'VV');
SELECT AVG(pcena_sd) FROM crmkartapohyby WHERE cislo_karty = 1 AND pohyb IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Function AVG fails during runtime in a procedure
